features.name: Initialize repository and publish markdown docs
features.description: Initialize the local project as a Git repository and push the markdown project documents to GitHub.
evidence: Created init.sh as the standard smoke-test entry point.
Created feature_list.json as the feature status source of truth.
PowerShell-equivalent smoke test passed because this Windows host only exposes the WSL bash shim and has no installed WSL distribution.
Merged remote main history without file conflicts.
Pushed local markdown documentation and project metadata to origin/main.

features.name: Create project README
features.description: Create a repository README that summarizes the project purpose, architecture, feature modules, document structure, and validation entry point.
evidence: Created README.md based on PRD.md and 系统设计说明书.md.
Smoke test passed after README creation.
README update was pushed to origin/main.

features.name: Task E alarm center and DingTalk close loop
features.description: Implement the unified alarm event contract, alarm persistence/snapshot/dedup service, alarm WebSocket push, DingTalk primary/escalation workflow, and alarm query/confirm APIs.
required_validation: python -m pytest tests/test_intrusion.py tests/test_fight.py tests/test_fight_integration.py tests/test_face.py tests/test_alarm_center.py
evidence: Updated AlarmEvent with type, region_id, camera_id, ts, level, snapshot_url, face_match, extra, while preserving legacy confidence/snapshot compatibility.

Implemented AlarmService raise_alarm() with 30s region/type dedup, snapshot persistence, intrusion/occupy face matching fallback, alarm_event persistence, level=0 private-only handling, WebSocket broadcast, and DingTalk notification trigger.
Implemented /ws/alarms broadcast registration and /api/alarms query, confirm, and snapshot access endpoints.
Implemented DingTalkNotifier notify/confirm/escalate with notification_log primary/escalated records, status transitions, timer cancellation, and no-webhook local-safe behavior.
Extended ORM models for camera_id, fight alarm type, extra JSON, Guard, notification_log guard FK, and indexes.
Added backend/tests/test_alarm_center.py covering persistence/snapshot/notify, dedup, level=0 private-only behavior, DingTalk confirm/escalation logs, and alarm HTTP API.
pytest passed: 27 passed for intrusion, fight, fight integration, face, and alarm center tests.

Real MySQL verification passed against DATABASE_URI from .env: connected to study_room, seeded minimal camera/region/guards, wrote confirmed fight, escalated intrusion, private fatigue alarms, and verified DingTalk notification logs without exposing secrets.
Added backend/scripts/verify_task_e_real_db.py as the repeatable real-database verification entry point.
backend app config now loads .env automatically and supports both KEY= and PowerShell $env:KEY= syntax.
backend/requirements.txt includes PyMySQL for mysql+pymysql DATABASE_URI values.
backend/tests/smoke_test.py passed after restoring StreamScheduler ring_buffer maxlen to 5.
PowerShell-equivalent init smoke passed with 16 markdown docs.
blockers: bash ./init.sh still cannot run on this Windows host because bash.exe is the WSL shim and no WSL distribution is installed; PowerShell-equivalent smoke was used and passed.

features.name: Implement Task B fatigue detection and study companion
features.description: Implement Dlib-landmark EAR/MAR fatigue detection, the FatiguePlugin, seat status persistence and hot reload, and configurable fatigue alarm level for DingTalk reminders.
required_validation: python -m py_compile backend/app/detectors/fatigue.py backend/app/api/seat_status.py backend/app/models/entities.py backend/app/config.py backend/app/services/alarm.py backend/app/detectors/face.py backend/app/__init__.py backend/app/stream/scheduler.py backend/run.py backend/tests/test_fatigue.py
python -m pytest tests/test_fatigue.py tests/test_alarm_center.py tests/test_face.py tests/test_intrusion.py tests/test_fight.py tests/test_fight_integration.py
evidence: Created branch codex/task-b-fatigue-companion from latest origin/main after stashing pre-existing local dirty work.
Fixed init.sh to validate root PRD.md after the PRD was moved out of openspec/specs.
Implemented FatigueDetector EAR/MAR state machine with sleepy/yawn outcomes and corrected inner-mouth 60-67 MAR indexing.
Implemented FatiguePlugin with Dlib landmark loading, active studying-seat reload, per-region state, hot update handling, and configurable AlarmEvent(type=fatigue) reminders.
Implemented POST /api/seat-status validation, seat-region requirement, application-level upsert, and fatigue plugin hot reload through the live StreamScheduler engine.
Registered FatiguePlugin in backend/run.py and exposed StreamScheduler.engine for API-triggered hot updates.

Fixed baseline blockers discovered by regression: duplicate Guard ORM model, missing AlarmService helper methods, FaceDetector mock fallback, duplicate WebSocket route registration, and local default DATABASE_URI fallback.
Added backend/tests/test_fatigue.py covering EAR duration, reset, yawn, level=0 fatigue events, resting disable, seat-status validation/upsert, hot reload, and multi-seat enable behavior.
py_compile passed for modified backend files and the new fatigue test.
pytest passed: 41 passed for fatigue, alarm center, face, intrusion, fight, and fight integration tests.
backend/tests/smoke_test.py passed.
PowerShell-equivalent init smoke passed with 15 markdown docs.
Docker dev runtime prepared: backend uses stable image ai-study-room-backend-env:dev, mounts ../backend and ../backend/model_weights, and runs gunicorn --reload for code reload without image rebuild.
Container runtime verified: dlib 19.24.9, cv2 4.9.0, shape_predictor_68_face_landmarks.dat present, demo seat region 5 set to studying, and POST /api/seat-status returned success.
RTMP pipeline debug verified with a temporary local test stream; after user clarification, Docker runtime defaults were corrected to the cloud RTMP server 49.233.71.82:9090.
Cloud RTMP runtime verified: backend pulled rtmp://49.233.71.82:9090/live/test successfully and persisted level=0 fatigue alarms with extra.kind=sleepy.
Fixed AlarmService camera_id persistence so camera_id=0 is stored as 0 instead of NULL; focused alarm/fatigue tests passed.
Pulled latest frontend files from origin/main and integrated /api/cameras so the dashboard can resolve the cloud RTMP camera stream into an HTTP-FLV playback URL; frontend production build passed.
Changed fatigue alerts to use configurable FATIGUE_ALERT_LEVEL, defaulting to 1 so studying-seat sleepy/yawn events enter the existing DingTalk notification path.
pytest passed: 15 passed for tests/test_fatigue.py and tests/test_alarm_center.py after adding coverage that level=1 fatigue alarms notify.
Docker backend was recreated without image rebuild; container config confirmed FATIGUE_ALERT_LEVEL=1 and DINGTALK_WEBHOOK unset.

Container smoke alarm id 48 persisted as type=fatigue level=1 status=notified with a primary notification_log record, proving the DingTalk notifier path is invoked; real external DingTalk send remains blocked until DINGTALK_WEBHOOK is configured.
blockers: bash ./init.sh still cannot run on this Windows host because bash.exe is the WSL shim and no WSL distribution is installed; PowerShell-equivalent smoke was used and passed.

Runtime Dlib fatigue inference requires backend/model_weights/shape_predictor_68_face_landmarks.dat or MODEL_DIR to point at that file; this workspace currently has the file, deployments must also provide it.
./init.sh cannot be executed directly from this PowerShell session due OS permission/WSL shim behavior; py_compile and Docker runtime checks were used for this Docker-focused pass.
Real DingTalk external send is not verified because DINGTALK_WEBHOOK is not set in the current Docker environment.

features.name: Verify Task B danger-zone intrusion end to end
features.description: Verify frontend danger-zone save API, backend hot reload, intrusion detection, alarm persistence, snapshot creation, and alarm query visibility.
required_validation: docker compose logs show intrusion active danger zones updated
docker compose exec backend PYTHONPATH=/app python scripts/verify_intrusion_e2e.py
python -m py_compile backend/scripts/verify_intrusion_e2e.py backend/app/detectors/intrusion.py backend/app/api/regions.py backend/run.py
evidence: Implemented database-backed /api/regions CRUD with validation for polygon >= 3 points, x_distance >= 0, y_stay_time >= 0, and type in danger_zone/seat.
Implemented IntrusionPlugin registration in backend/run.py and restored PersonDetector + per-region IntrusionDetector runtime loading from the region table.
POST /api/regions created danger_zone id=6 named E2E Intrusion Zone for camera_id=0 with polygon [[0,0],[640,0],[640,360],[0,360]].
GET /api/regions?camera_id=0 returned region id=6 with type=danger_zone and the saved polygon, matching the frontend draw/save data shape.
Backend logs showed [engine] registered detector intrusion and [intrusion] active danger zones: [6], proving hot reload consumed the saved region.
Container verification script scripts/verify_intrusion_e2e.py simulated a person box entering region 6 through IntrusionPlugin and persisted alarm id=103.
GET /api/alarms?status=notified returned alarm id=103 with type=intrusion, region_id=6, camera_id=0, status=notified, face_match=stranger, and person_box evidence.
Snapshot file /app/snapshots/alarm_6_intrusion_1783691102938.jpg exists for alarm id=103.
Focused backend tests passed: python -m pytest tests/test_intrusion.py tests/test_alarm_center.py -> 9 passed.
Frontend production build passed via npm.cmd --prefix frontend run build.
blockers: Live cloud RTMP rtmp://49.233.71.82:9090/live/test was unavailable during this verification window: direct container OpenCV check returned opened False/read False, so the person-entry trigger was verified with a deterministic mocked person box instead of a live human camera frame.

Direct npm.cmd run build from inside the Chinese-character frontend path failed with a Vite/Rollup absolute-path emitted asset error; npm.cmd --prefix frontend run build from the repository root passed.

features.name: Implement simple seat identity check
features.description: For active studying seats, compare the face match of a person entering the seat polygon against the reserved seat_status.user_id and raise occupy for mismatches.
required_validation: python -m py_compile backend/app/detectors/intrusion.py backend/app/api/seat_status.py backend/tests/test_intrusion_identity.py backend/tests/test_fatigue.py
python -m pytest tests/test_intrusion.py tests/test_intrusion_identity.py tests/test_fatigue.py tests/test_alarm_center.py
docker compose logs show active reserved seats
evidence: Extended IntrusionPlugin to load active studying seat regions from seat_status joined with region type=seat.
When a person enters an active reserved seat, IntrusionPlugin crops the person box, runs FaceMatcher, and compares the result to member:<seat_status.user_id>.
If the face match equals the reserved user, no alarm is produced.
If the face match differs or falls back to stranger, IntrusionPlugin raises AlarmEvent(type=occupy) with extra.kind=unauthorized_seat, expected_user_id, actual_face_match, and person_box.
POST /api/seat-status now hot-updates both fatigue and intrusion plugins, so reservation/status changes are picked up without backend restart.
Added backend/tests/test_intrusion_identity.py covering reserved-user no-alarm and unreserved-user occupy alarm.
Focused tests passed: python -m pytest tests/test_intrusion.py tests/test_intrusion_identity.py tests/test_fatigue.py tests/test_alarm_center.py -> 20 passed.
Backend container logs showed [intrusion] active reserved seats: [5], confirming runtime loaded active studying seats.

After placing dlib_face_recognition_resnet_model_v1.dat, Docker runtime verified /app/model_weights/dlib_face_recognition_resnet_model_v1.dat exists with size 22466066 and FaceMatcher.dlib_loaded=True.
Backend restart logs showed [face] FaceMatcher initialized and [face] FaceDetector ready.
blockers: Real reserved-user no-alarm testing still requires enrolled member.feature records for the same user_id as seat_status. Current Docker database has seat_status region_id=5 user_id=1001 status=studying, but the member table is empty.
Cloud RTMP live stream remains external-state dependent; direct container OpenCV check on rtmp://49.233.71.82:9090/live/test returned opened=False/read=False.
